title: sykua Respirator Mask, Half-Face Respirator with Filters and Safety Goggles for Spray Paint, Dust, Chemicals, Sanding, Building Work, Woodworking, and Other Work Protection
features: Dual Protection Design: Our half face respirator offers comprehensive respiratory protection and comes with safety goggles to ensure eye safety during work, preventing harmful substances from entering.

High-Efficiency Filtration System: Equipped with high-efficiency filters and filter cotton, effectively filtering dust, gas, and harmful gases, ensuring safe breathing. The breathing valve design enhances comfort, reducing breathing resistance.
Comfortable and Adjustable Fit: Elastic head strap design allows for easy adjustment, fitting various head sizes, ensuring a stable and non-slip wear for prolonged comfort.

Durable and Reliable Materials: Made from high-quality materials, this respirator is durable and safe, suitable for spray paint, dust, chemical, sanding, building Work, industrial, home, laboratory, and various other settings, providing long-lasting protection.

Complete Accessories Included: 1 * respirator; 1 * Safety Goggles; 2x replaceable 6001 filter cartridges; 8 x cotton filters, ensuring long-term use without frequent replacement, offering a more economical and practical choice.
description: Product Description Respirator with Filters and Safety Goggles Package Included 1 * Respirator 2 * Replaceable 6001 filter cartridges 8 * 5N11 Filter cotton pads 1 * Safety goggles Warm Attention This half-face respirator is only suitable for daily work Replaceable Filter Cotton Except the filter inside the package. Also suitable for as 2097 2071 2076 2078 2091 2297 2291 2296 2096 filter and 6001 6002 6003 6004 6005 6006 6009 6098 60926 60928 7093 etc. filter Cartridge. Filter Cotton Applicable Scope Particulates: Includes dust, pollen, sawdust, and other fine airborne particles. Gases and Vapors: Effectively filters out certain gases and vapors, such as chemicals, solvent vapors, and gases. Liquid Splashes: Prevents liquid chemicals, paints, and cleaning agents from entering the respiratory system. Silicone Material Made of soft, safe, and non-toxic food-grade silicone for comfortable wear. Fits Most face shapes Ergonomically designed to fit most face shapes, ensuring a good seal and comfort. Easy to Clean Finely crafted with smooth edges; easy cleaning. Breathing Valve Includes a valve to effectively expel moisture and heat, reducing breathing resistance and enhancing comfort. When to Change the Filter Cotton? When you feel that the breathing resistance is obviously too large, the human body feels uncomfortable,or the filter dust is dirty or damaged, the filter cotton needs to be replaced. The filter cotton is usually replaced in about 8 hours (you can extend or shorten the service life according to your environment) Warm Tips: Used in special cases: the filter box is generally replaced within 200 hours. Used normally: the filter box can be used without changing or extending the time. The filter box and filter cotton can not be washed, other parts of the mask can be cleaned. Don the Mask Place the mask over your nose and mouth, ensuring it fully covers your airways. Adjust the Head Straps Tighten the head straps to fit snugly and comfortably on your head, ensuring the mask is secure and not loose. Seal Check Cover the breathing valve with your palm and gently inhale. The mask should slightly collapse onto your face without noticeable leakage. If there is any leakage, readjust the mask and straps until a proper seal is achieved. Spray Painting Used in auto repair shops, furniture manufacturing, and other settings requiring spray painting to prevent inhalation of paint mist and chemicals. Construction and Renovation Protects against dust, debris, and substances during demolition, renovation, and construction work. Agricultural Work Provides protection while working on the farm Painting Ideal for use in painting applications to protect against inhalation of fumes and particulates from paints, varnishes, and other coatings.
